name: Hutchison Port Holdings Trust
summary: Hutchison Port Holdings Trust invests in, develops, operates, and manages deep-water container ports in Guangdong Province of the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and Macau. It also invests in other types of port assets, including river ports; and undertakes various port ancillary services, such as freight forwarding, supply chain management, warehousing, and distribution services. Hutchison Port Holdings Trust was founded in 2011 and is based in Singapore.
